scripts.dev: concurrently -n py,react,electron -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run dev:python" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/health && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=true LUMINA_DEV_BACKEND_PORT=8000 electron .
scripts.dist: npm run build:python && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
